goal: Add a side-effect-free authority builder that records a memory-cache audit export permit artifact from ready issue preflight while keeping permit consume, file writes, durable persistence, external actions, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, write export files, add durable persistence, call external systems, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready memory-cache audit export permit issue preflight can produce a side-effect-free permit artifact.
Permit id, issuer, and expiry refs are required.
Permit consume and file writes remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit consumption and export writing require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing permit id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, file writes, durable persistence, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-108 preflighted memory-cache audit export permit issue without issuing or consuming a permit.
